title: croton rubiginosus
intro: Croton rubiginosus, also known as Red Stemmed Croton, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Croton rubiginosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often dried and used in teas, decoctions, or as a powder to leverage its medicinal properties.
